creator: geezabiscuit2@hotmail.com
text: When I establish a tunnel I'm picking up an IP address on the remote LAN via DHCP. I can confirm this by checking the assigned IP on my tap0 device. But any attempt to use a network resource over the tunnel times out. I've noticed that trying to display a route with 'route get <ip>', even to a local lan address, takes about 44 seconds while connected to the tunnel, but less than a second when the tunnel is not established.
